name: Steamed Mussels with Tomato Sauce & Feta
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Clove garlic, peeled and minced
1 28-oz can Peeled and diced tomatoes, undrained
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add the onion and garlic; sauté for 5 minutes.
2. Stir in the white wine, oregano, crushed red pepper flakes, and salt. Let simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Add the undrained tomatoes and water. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and let simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, bring a large pot of water to a boil for the pasta. Cook according to package directions, then drain.
5. Prepare the mussels by placing them on a steamer rack over the sauce in the large pot. Cover and steam until the mussel shells open (discard any that do not open).
6. Remove the mussels from the steamer and divide the pasta among the sauce with parsley. Add pepper to taste.
7. Sprinkle with crumbled feta cheese and arrange the mussels on top. Serve.
